name: Skeljungur hf.
summary: Skeljungur hf., together with its subsidiaries, imports, distributes, and sells oil, lubricants, chemical products, and fertilizers. The company is also involved in the retail and wholesale trade of other commodities. In addition, it engages in lending and other activities; and operates real estate properties, as well as vessels and service stations. The company operates a network of 65 gas stations, including 48 Orkan, as well as 4 oil depots in Iceland; and 11 retail and fuel stations, and 2 oil depots in the Faroe Islands. Skeljungur hf. was founded in 1928 and is based in Reykjav√É¬≠k, Iceland.
